announcementText: The Regulatory Strategy Sprint is now accepting applications.
footerTagline: Rellia connects promising digital health founders with industry experts, clinicians, and engaged investors.
priorityModalBody: We’ve redesigned our digital experience to better serve the clinicians, operators, and founders shaping the future of care. We're incredibly glad you're here—let us help you find your next step.
priorityModalHeading: Welcome to the Rellia Health Network.
